title: bridelia assamica
intro: Bridelia assamica, also known as Gokhru or Gokharu, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bridelia assamica include its ability to treat kidney stones, improve urinary function, and reduce fever, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Bridelia assamica can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
